notes: The Lab control panel is now smaller and uses a darker dark-mode surface.
Unnecessary horizontal scrolling on the Lab page was removed.
Lab feature ON/OFF toggles now wrap in a compact layout.
The month selector now includes a current month shortcut.
Dark-mode colors for the Lab control panel were refined.
Fixed cost diagnosis was reorganized as Lab(Beta).
A lab feature ON/OFF control panel was added.
Top 5 fixed expense item analysis was added.
Top 5 payment method outflow analysis was added.
Experimental analyses such as annual monthly reserve, small fixed costs, and next three month events were added.
Expense calendar now shows notable months at the top.
Dashboard income composition now uses income item Top 5 plus Other.
Expense calendar now shows remaining and outflow rate bars.
Dashboard and query month selectors now use a wheel style.
Major update celebration now repeats every 10 seconds while the app runs.
Stable version availability display is more accurate.
Excel sample template download and XLSX import were added.
Dashboard monthly expected balance chart was removed.
Dashboard income composition was refined to Top 5 plus Other.
Dashboard outflow composition chart was kept.
Dashboard three-month expected flow chart was kept.
Expense calendar keeps monthly expected balance and rate details.
Twelve-month income, outflow, and balance outlook was refined.
